title: Warn on use of --kernel-memory
body:
It has been depracated and is no longer supported.  Fully remove it and
only print a warning if a user uses it.

Fixes: https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2011695

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM but I can't actually test it because I don't have a cgroupsv1 system easily available
SGTM but lint is whining: run_memory_test.go:6:2: \"strconv\" imported but not used
